creator: mark.hannon@stockholm.mail.telia.com
text:
I am trying to build aout binaries under 3.1-RELEASE.  (The reason
	I am doing so is to build under the XiG CDE product which is only
	availabe with aout libraries)

	I try to build:
	putte:/usr/proj/mail2leafnode> objformat 
	aout
	putte:/usr/proj/mail2leafnode> make
	gcc -g -o nntpd nntpd.o config.o nntputil.o configutil.o xoverutil.o activutil.o miscutil.o  artutil.o filterutil.o 
	ld: crt0.o: No such file or directory
	*** Error code 1

	Stop.

	I copy /usr/lib/crt0.o from my 2.2.8 CD and try again...
	putte:/usr/proj/mail2leafnode> make
	gcc -g -o nntpd nntpd.o config.o nntputil.o configutil.o xoverutil.o activutil.o miscutil.o  artutil.o filterutil.o 
	ld: /usr/lib/libgcc.a(): bad magic
	*** Error code 1

	Stop.

	Now I am stumped...
